prompt:
Generate a Chinese twenty-four solar terms poster with the theme "Grain in Ear".
The AI will independently conceive the most appropriate content and composition, with an overall style of high-end Oriental aesthetic poster that young people like, combining new Chinese style, minimalism, magazine feel, and social media appeal.
The image should reflect the seasonal atmosphere of Grain in Ear, the early summer vibe, and emotions of "sowing, growth, hope, busyness and harvest," avoiding old-fashioned agricultural propaganda.
The overall requirements are fresh, high-end, youthful, with whitespace and aesthetic appeal, suitable for a series of solar term posters.
Include clear and beautiful typography in the image: "Grain in Ear" and small English text "Grain in Ear", which can be paired with a short copy produced by the AI.
No logos, no watermarks, no complex or cluttered backgrounds.
